(* ******************************************************************************* *)
(** * Bicategories
    Benedikt Ahrens, Marco Maggesi
    February 2018

   Dependent sum of displayed bicategories
 ********************************************************************************* *)

Require Import UniMath.Foundations.All.

Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]
Notation "_ ≠ _" was already used in scope nat_scope.
[notation-overridden,parsing,default]

Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Categories.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.Core.Functors.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.PrecategoryBinProduct.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Core.
Require Import UniMath.CategoryTheory.DisplayedCats.Constructions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.Bicat. Import Bicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispBicat. Import DispBicat.Notations.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.EquivToAdjequiv.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.Core.AdjointUnique.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispInvertibles.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispAdjunctions.
Require Import UniMath.Bicategories.DisplayedBicats.DispUnivalence.

Local Open Scope cat.
Local Open Scope mor_disp_scope.

Definition make_total_ob {C : bicat} {D : disp_bicat C} {a : C} (aa : D a)
  : total_bicat D
  := (a,, aa).

Definition make_total_mor {C : bicat} {D : disp_bicat C}
           {a b : C} {f : C⟦a, b⟧}
           {aa : D a} {bb : D b} (ff : aa -->[f] bb)
  : make_total_ob aa --> make_total_ob bb
  := (f,, ff).

Definition make_total_cell {C : bicat} {D : disp_bicat C}
           {a b : C} {f g : C⟦a, b⟧} {aa : D a} {bb : D b}
           {ff : aa -->[f] bb}
           {gg : aa -->[g] bb}
           (η : f ==> g)
           (ηη : ff ==>[η] gg)
  : (make_total_mor ff) ==> (make_total_mor gg)
  := (η,, ηη).

(* Useful? *)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
x, y: make_total_mor ff ==> make_total_mor gg
e: pr1 x = pr1 y
ee: pr2 x =
transportb (λ η : f ==> g, ff ==>[ η] gg) e
  (pr2 y)
x = y


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: D a
bb: D b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
x, y: make_total_mor ff ==> make_total_mor gg
e: pr1 x = pr1 y
ee: pr2 x =
transportb (λ η : f ==> g, ff ==>[ η] gg) e
  (pr2 y)
x = y

  exact (total2_paths2_b e ee).
Defined.

Section Sigma.
  Variable (C : bicat)
           (D : disp_bicat C)
           (E : disp_bicat (total_bicat D)).

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_cat_ob_mor C

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_cat_ob_mor C

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
∏ x y : C,
(∑ d : D x, E (x,, d))
→ (∑ d : D y, E (y,, d)) → C ⟦ x, y ⟧ → UU

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
x, y: C
xx: ∑ d : D x, E (x,, d)
yy: ∑ d : D y, E (y,, d)
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
UU

    exact (∑ (fD : pr1 xx -->[f] pr1 yy), pr2 xx -->[f,,fD] pr2 yy).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_cat_id_comp C sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_cat_id_comp C sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
∏ (x : C) (xx : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
∏ (x : C) (xx : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x),
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
x: C
xx: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x
xx -->[ id₁ x] xx

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
x: C
xx: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x
pr2 xx -->[ id₁ x,, id_disp (pr1 xx)] pr2 xx
 exact (id_disp (pr2 xx)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
∏ (x y z : C) (f : C ⟦ x, y ⟧) (g : C ⟦ y, z ⟧)
(xx : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x)
(yy : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor y)
(zz : sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor z),
xx -->[ f] yy → yy -->[ g] zz → xx -->[ f · g] zz
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x
yy: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor y
zz: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
xx -->[ f · g] zz

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
x, y, z: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
g: C ⟦ y, z ⟧
xx: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor x
yy: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor y
zz: sigma_disp_cat_ob_mor z
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
gg: yy -->[ g] zz
pr2 xx -->[ f · g,, pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg] pr2 zz
 exact (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg).
  Defined.

  Definition sigma_disp_cat_data : disp_cat_data C
    := (_ ,, sigma_disp_cat_id_comp).

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells C

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_2cell_struct sigma_disp_cat_data

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
∏ (c c' : C) (f g : C ⟦ c, c' ⟧),
f ==> g
→ ∏ (d : sigma_disp_cat_data c)
  (d' : sigma_disp_cat_data c'),
  d -->[ f] d' → d -->[ g] d' → UU

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
c, c': C
f, g: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
x: f ==> g
d: sigma_disp_cat_data c
d': sigma_disp_cat_data c'
ff: d -->[ f] d'
gg: d -->[ g] d'
UU

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
c, c': C
f, g: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
x: f ==> g
d: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
d': ∑ d : D c', E (c',, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 d -->[ f] pr1 d',
pr2 d -->[ f,, fD] pr2 d'
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 d -->[ g] pr1 d',
pr2 d -->[ g,, fD] pr2 d'
UU

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
c, c': C
f, g: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
x: f ==> g
d: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
d': ∑ d : D c', E (c',, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 d -->[ f] pr1 d',
pr2 d -->[ f,, fD] pr2 d'
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 d -->[ g] pr1 d',
pr2 d -->[ g,, fD] pr2 d'
xx: pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
UU

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
c, c': C
f, g: C ⟦ c, c' ⟧
x: f ==> g
d: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
d': ∑ d : D c', E (c',, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 d -->[ f] pr1 d',
pr2 d -->[ f,, fD] pr2 d'
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 d -->[ g] pr1 d',
pr2 d -->[ g,, fD] pr2 d'
xx: pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
PPP:= (f,, pr1 ff) ==> (g,, pr1 gg): UU
UU

    exact (pr2 ff ==>[(x,, xx) : PPP] pr2 gg).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_prebicat_data C

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_prebicat_data C

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_prebicat_ops sigma_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑ xx : pr1 f' ==>[ id₂ f] pr1 f',
pr2 f' ==>[ id₂ f,, xx] pr2 f'
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f' ==>[ lunitor f] pr1 f',
id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f' ==>[ lunitor f,, xx] pr2 f'
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ runitor f] pr1 f',
pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[ runitor f,, xx] pr2 f'
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : pr1 f' ==>[
     linvunitor f] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f',
pr2 f' ==>[
linvunitor f,, xx] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f'
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : pr1 f' ==>[
     rinvunitor f] pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y),
pr2 f' ==>[
rinvunitor f,, xx] pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
∑
xx : pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ==>[
     rassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh),
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ==>[
rassociator f g h,, xx] pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
∑
xx : pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
     lassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh,
pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
lassociator f g h,, xx] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r: f ==> g
s: g ==> h
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
(∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ r] pr1 gg,
 pr2 ff ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg)
→ (∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ s] pr1 hh,
   pr2 gg ==>[ s,, xx] pr2 hh)
  → ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ r • s] pr1 hh,
    pr2 ff ==>[ (r • s),, xx] pr2 hh
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: g1 ==> g2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg1: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g1] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g1,, fD] pr2 z
gg2: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g2] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g2,, fD] pr2 z
(∑ xx : pr1 gg1 ==>[ r] pr1 gg2,
 pr2 gg1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg2)
→ ∑
  xx : pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg2,
  pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg1 ==>[
  (f ◃ r),, xx] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg2
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: f1 ==> f2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff1: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f1] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f1,, fD] pr2 y
ff2: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f2] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f2,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
(∑ xx : pr1 ff1 ==>[ r] pr1 ff2,
 pr2 ff1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 ff2)
→ ∑
  xx : pr1 ff1 ;; pr1 gg ==>[ r ▹ g] pr1 ff2 ;; pr1 gg,
  pr2 ff1 ;; pr2 gg ==>[
  (r ▹ g),, xx] pr2 ff2 ;; pr2 gg

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑ xx : pr1 f' ==>[ id₂ f] pr1 f',
pr2 f' ==>[ id₂ f,, xx] pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
pr2 f' ==>[ id₂ f,, disp_id2 (pr1 f')] pr2 f'
 exact (disp_id2 _).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f' ==>[ lunitor f] pr1 f',
id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f' ==>[ lunitor f,, xx] pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f' ==>[
lunitor f,, disp_lunitor (pr1 f')] pr2 f'
 exact (disp_lunitor (pr2 f')).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ runitor f] pr1 f',
pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[ runitor f,, xx] pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[
runitor f,, disp_runitor (pr1 f')] pr2 f'
 exact (disp_runitor (pr2 f')).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : pr1 f' ==>[
     linvunitor f] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 f',
pr2 f' ==>[
linvunitor f,, xx] id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 f'
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
pr2 f' ==>[
linvunitor f,, disp_linvunitor (pr1 f')] id_disp
                                           (pr2 x) ;; 
pr2 f'
 exact (disp_linvunitor (pr2 f')).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
∑
xx : pr1 f' ==>[
     rinvunitor f] pr1 f' ;; id_disp (pr1 y),
pr2 f' ==>[
rinvunitor f,, xx] pr2 f' ;; id_disp (pr2 y)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
f': ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
pr2 f' ==>[
rinvunitor f,, disp_rinvunitor (pr1 f')] pr2 f' ;; 
id_disp (pr2 y)
 exact (disp_rinvunitor (pr2 f')).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
∑
xx : pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ==>[
     rassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh),
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ==>[
rassociator f g h,, xx] pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ==>[
rassociator f g h,,
disp_rassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)] pr2 ff ;; 
(pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)

      exact (disp_rassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
∑
xx : pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
     lassociator f g h] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh,
pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
lassociator f g h,, xx] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
lassociator f g h,,
disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)] pr2 ff ;; 
pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh

      exact (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r: f ==> g
s: g ==> h
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
(∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ r] pr1 gg,
 pr2 ff ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg)
→ (∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ s] pr1 hh,
   pr2 gg ==>[ s,, xx] pr2 hh)
  → ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ r • s] pr1 hh,
    pr2 ff ==>[ (r • s),, xx] pr2 hh
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r: f ==> g
s: g ==> h
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
xx: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ r] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg
yy: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ s] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ s,, xx] pr2 hh
∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ r • s] pr1 hh,
pr2 ff ==>[ (r • s),, xx] pr2 hh

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
r: f ==> g
s: g ==> h
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
xx: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ r] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg
yy: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ s] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ s,, xx] pr2 hh
pr2 ff ==>[ (r • s),, pr1 xx •• pr1 yy] pr2 hh

      exact (disp_vcomp2 (pr2 xx) (pr2 yy)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: g1 ==> g2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg1: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g1] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g1,, fD] pr2 z
gg2: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g2] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g2,, fD] pr2 z
(∑ xx : pr1 gg1 ==>[ r] pr1 gg2,
 pr2 gg1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg2)
→ ∑
  xx : pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg2,
  pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg1 ==>[
  (f ◃ r),, xx] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg2
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: g1 ==> g2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg1: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g1] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g1,, fD] pr2 z
gg2: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g2] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g2,, fD] pr2 z
xx: ∑ xx : pr1 gg1 ==>[ r] pr1 gg2,
pr2 gg1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg2
∑
xx : pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg2,
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg1 ==>[ (f ◃ r),, xx] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg2

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g1, g2: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: g1 ==> g2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg1: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g1] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g1,, fD] pr2 z
gg2: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g2] pr1 z, pr2 y -->[ g2,, fD] pr2 z
xx: ∑ xx : pr1 gg1 ==>[ r] pr1 gg2,
pr2 gg1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 gg2
pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg1 ==>[
(f ◃ r),, pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 xx] pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg2

      exact (disp_lwhisker (pr2 ff) (pr2 xx)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: f1 ==> f2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff1: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f1] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f1,, fD] pr2 y
ff2: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f2] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f2,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
(∑ xx : pr1 ff1 ==>[ r] pr1 ff2,
 pr2 ff1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 ff2)
→ ∑
  xx : pr1 ff1 ;; pr1 gg ==>[ r ▹ g] pr1 ff2 ;; pr1 gg,
  pr2 ff1 ;; pr2 gg ==>[
  (r ▹ g),, xx] pr2 ff2 ;; pr2 gg
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: f1 ==> f2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff1: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f1] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f1,, fD] pr2 y
ff2: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f2] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f2,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
xx: ∑ xx : pr1 ff1 ==>[ r] pr1 ff2,
pr2 ff1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 ff2
∑
xx : pr1 ff1 ;; pr1 gg ==>[ r ▹ g] pr1 ff2 ;; pr1 gg,
pr2 ff1 ;; pr2 gg ==>[ (r ▹ g),, xx] pr2 ff2 ;; pr2 gg

      
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f1, f2: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
r: f1 ==> f2
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff1: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f1] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f1,, fD] pr2 y
ff2: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f2] pr1 y, pr2 x -->[ f2,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
xx: ∑ xx : pr1 ff1 ==>[ r] pr1 ff2,
pr2 ff1 ==>[ r,, xx] pr2 ff2
pr2 ff1 ;; pr2 gg ==>[
(r ▹ g),, pr1 xx ▹▹ pr1 gg] pr2 ff2 ;; pr2 gg

      exact (disp_rwhisker (pr2 gg) (pr2 xx)).
  Defined.

  (* Needed? *)
  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: total_bicat E
f, g: total_bicat E ⟦ a, b ⟧
x, y: f ==> g
eq1: pr1 x = pr1 y
eq2: pr2 x = transportb (λ z : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ z] pr2 g) eq1 (pr2 y)
x = y

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: total_bicat E
f, g: total_bicat E ⟦ a, b ⟧
x, y: f ==> g
eq1: pr1 x = pr1 y
eq2: pr2 x = transportb (λ z : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ z] pr2 g) eq1 (pr2 y)
x = y

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: total_bicat E
f, g: total_bicat E ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr1 f ==> pr1 g
xx: pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g
y: f ==> g
eq1: pr1 (x,, xx) = pr1 y
eq2: pr2 (x,, xx) =
transportb (λ z : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ z] pr2 g) eq1 (pr2 y)
x,, xx = y

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: total_bicat E
f, g: total_bicat E ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: pr1 f ==> pr1 g
xx: pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g
y: pr1 f ==> pr1 g
yy: pr2 f ==>[ y] pr2 g
eq1: pr1 (x,, xx) = pr1 (y,, yy)
eq2: pr2 (x,, xx) =
transportb (λ z : pr1 f ==> pr1 g, pr2 f ==>[ z] pr2 g) eq1 (pr2 (y,, yy))
x,, xx = y,, yy

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: ∑ x : ∑ x : C, D x, E x
f, g: ∑
f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧,
    pr21 a -->[ f] pr21 b, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
x: total_prebicat_cell_struct D (pr1 a) (pr1 b)
  (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
xx: pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g
y: total_prebicat_cell_struct D (pr1 a) (pr1 b)
  (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
yy: pr2 f ==>[ y] pr2 g
eq1: x = y
eq2: xx =
transportb
(λ z : total_prebicat_cell_struct D (pr1 a) (pr1 b) (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
pr2 f ==>[ z] pr2 g) eq1 yy
x,, xx = y,, yy

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: ∑ x : ∑ x : C, D x, E x
f, g: ∑
f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧,
    pr21 a -->[ f] pr21 b, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
x: total_prebicat_cell_struct D (pr1 a) (pr1 b)
  (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
xx, yy: pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g
eq2: xx =
transportb
(λ z : total_prebicat_cell_struct D (pr1 a) (pr1 b) (pr1 f) (pr1 g),
pr2 f ==>[ z] pr2 g) (idpath x) yy
x,, xx = x,, yy

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: ∑ x : ∑ x : C, D x, E x
f, g: ∑
f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧,
    pr21 a -->[ f] pr21 b, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
x: total_prebicat_cell_struct D (pr1 a) (pr1 b)
  (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
xx, yy: pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g
eq2: xx = yy
x,, xx = x,, yy

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: ∑ x : ∑ x : C, D x, E x
f, g: ∑
f : ∑ f : C ⟦ pr11 a, pr11 b ⟧,
    pr21 a -->[ f] pr21 b, pr2 a -->[ f] pr2 b
x: total_prebicat_cell_struct D (pr1 a) (pr1 b)
  (pr1 f) (pr1 g)
xx, yy: pr2 f ==>[ x] pr2 g
eq2: xx = yy
xx = yy

    exact eq2.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_prebicat_laws sigma_bicat_data

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
disp_prebicat_laws sigma_bicat_data

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
disp_id2 (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη =
transportb (λ x' : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 gg)
  (id2_left η) (pr1 ηη)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
disp_id2 (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ a0] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg)
  (total2_paths2_b (id2_left η) ?Goal) (pr2 ηη)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
pr1 ηη •• disp_id2 (pr1 gg) =
transportb (λ x' : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 gg)
  (id2_right η) (pr1 ηη)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
pr2 ηη •• disp_id2 (pr2 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ a0] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg)
  (total2_paths2_b (id2_right η) ?Goal1) (pr2 ηη)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
kk: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ k,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 hh
ψψ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk,
pr2 hh ==>[ ψ,, xx] pr2 kk
pr1 ηη •• (pr1 φφ •• pr1 ψψ) =
transportb (λ x' : f ==> k, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
kk: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ k,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 hh
ψψ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk,
pr2 hh ==>[ ψ,, xx] pr2 kk
pr2 ηη •• (pr2 φφ •• pr2 ψψ) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f ==> k, pr1 ff ==>[ a0] pr1 kk,
   pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 kk)
  (total2_paths2_b (vassocr η φ ψ) ?Goal3)
  ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
pr1 ff ◃◃ disp_id2 (pr1 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ x'] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))

pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y

pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z

   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 hh
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 ηη) •• (pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · g ==> f · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ x'] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
  (pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ))

D: disp_bicat C

a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

φ: h ==> i

pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z

pr2 gg ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 hh

pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii

            pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ a0] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 ff ;; 
   pr2 ii)

  (pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ))

pr2 gg ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 hh

  (λ x' : f · i ==> h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii ==>[ x'] pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ)
  ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) ▹▹ pr1 ii)

ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh) •• (pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 φφ) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · h ==> g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ x'] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh) •• (pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 φφ) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · h ==> g · i,
            pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ a0] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg ;; 
   pr2 ii)
  (total2_paths2_b (vcomp_whisker η φ) ?Goal23)
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff) =
transportb
  (λ x' : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
   x'] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f)
  (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr2 ff) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
            id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
            a0] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff,
   id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] id_disp
                                            (pr2 x) ;; 
   pr2 ff)
  (total2_paths2_b (lunitor_linvunitor f) ?Goal25)
  (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff))

pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y

transportb (λ x' : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))

pr2 w -->[ g,, fD] pr2 x
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y

pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z

  ◃◃ disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii))

   pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 ff ;;

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
disp_id2 (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη =
transportb (λ x' : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 gg)
  (id2_left η) (pr1 ηη)
 apply disp_id2_left.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
disp_id2 (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ a0] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg)
  (total2_paths2_b (id2_left η)
     (disp_id2_left (pr1 ηη))) (pr2 ηη)
 apply (disp_id2_left (pr2 ηη)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)

pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg

transportb (λ x' : f ==> g, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 gg)
  (id2_right η) (pr1 ηη)
 apply disp_id2_right.

  (total2_paths2_b (id2_right η)

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
kk: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ k,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 hh
ψψ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk,
pr2 hh ==>[ ψ,, xx] pr2 kk
pr1 ηη •• (pr1 φφ •• pr1 ψψ) =
transportb (λ x' : f ==> k, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 kk)
  (vassocr η φ ψ) ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) •• pr1 ψψ)
 apply disp_vassocr.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g, h, k: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
ψ: h ==> k
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
kk: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ k] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ k,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 hh
ψψ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ ψ] pr1 kk,
pr2 hh ==>[ ψ,, xx] pr2 kk
pr2 ηη •• (pr2 φφ •• pr2 ψψ) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f ==> k, pr1 ff ==>[ a0] pr1 kk,
   pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 kk)
  (total2_paths2_b (vassocr η φ ψ)
     (disp_vassocr (pr1 ηη) (pr1 φφ) (pr1 ψψ)))
  ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) •• pr2 ψψ)
 apply (disp_vassocr (pr2 ηη) (pr2 φφ) (pr2 ψψ)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
pr1 ff ◃◃ disp_id2 (pr1 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ x'] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
  (lwhisker_id2 f g) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
 apply disp_lwhisker_id2.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
pr2 ff ◃◃ disp_id2 (pr2 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · g ==> f · g,
            pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ a0] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 ff ;; 
   pr2 gg)
  (total2_paths2_b (lwhisker_id2 f g)
     (disp_lwhisker_id2 (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)))
  (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))
 apply (disp_lwhisker_id2 (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
disp_id2 (pr1 ff) ▹▹ pr1 gg =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · g ==> f · g,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ x'] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg)
  (id2_rwhisker f g) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg))
 apply disp_id2_rwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
disp_id2 (pr2 ff) ▹▹ pr2 gg =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · g ==> f · g,
            pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ a0] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 ff ;; 
   pr2 gg)
  (total2_paths2_b (id2_rwhisker f g)
     (disp_id2_rwhisker (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)))
  (disp_id2 (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg))
 apply (disp_id2_rwhisker (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 hh
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 ηη) •• (pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · g ==> f · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ x'] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii)
  (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
  (pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ))
 apply disp_lwhisker_vcomp.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g, h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: g ==> h
φ: h ==> i
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ g] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ g,, fD] pr2 z
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ η] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 hh
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 ηη) •• (pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · g ==> f · i,
            pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ==>[ a0] pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 ff ;; 
   pr2 ii)
  (total2_paths2_b (lwhisker_vcomp f η φ)
     (disp_lwhisker_vcomp (pr1 ηη) (pr1 φφ)))
  (pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ))
 apply (disp_lwhisker_vcomp (ff := (pr2 ff)) (pr2 ηη) (pr2 φφ)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 hh
(pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii) •• (pr1 φφ ▹▹ pr1 ii) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · i ==> h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii ==>[ x'] pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
  (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ)
  ((pr1 ηη •• pr1 φφ) ▹▹ pr1 ii)
 apply disp_rwhisker_vcomp.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f, g, h: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: g ==> h
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ φ] pr1 hh,
pr2 gg ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 hh
(pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii) •• (pr2 φφ ▹▹ pr2 ii) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · i ==> h · i,
            pr1 ff ;; pr1 ii ==>[ a0] pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 ii ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 hh ;; 
   pr2 ii)
  (total2_paths2_b (rwhisker_vcomp i η φ)
     (disp_rwhisker_vcomp (pr1 ηη) (pr1 φφ)))
  ((pr2 ηη •• pr2 φφ) ▹▹ pr2 ii)
 apply (disp_rwhisker_vcomp (ii := pr2 ii) (pr2 ηη) (pr2 φφ)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
(id_disp (pr1 x) ◃◃ pr1 ηη) •• disp_lunitor (pr1 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x' : id₁ a · f ==> g,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 gg)
  (vcomp_lunitor f g η)
  (disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
 apply disp_vcomp_lunitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
(id_disp (pr2 x) ◃◃ pr2 ηη) •• disp_lunitor (pr2 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : id₁ a · f ==> g,
            id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[ a0] pr1 gg,
   id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg)
  (total2_paths2_b (vcomp_lunitor f g η)
     (disp_vcomp_lunitor (pr1 ηη)))
  (disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη)
 apply (disp_vcomp_lunitor (pr2 ηη)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
(pr1 ηη ▹▹ id_disp (pr1 y)) •• disp_runitor (pr1 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · id₁ b ==> g,
   pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ x'] pr1 gg)
  (vcomp_runitor f g η)
  (disp_runitor (pr1 ff) •• pr1 ηη)
 apply disp_vcomp_runitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
η: f ==> g
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
(pr2 ηη ▹▹ id_disp (pr2 y)) •• disp_runitor (pr2 gg) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · id₁ b ==> g,
            pr1 ff ;; id_disp (pr1 y) ==>[ a0] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ;; id_disp (pr2 y) ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg)
  (total2_paths2_b (vcomp_runitor f g η)
     (disp_vcomp_runitor (pr1 ηη)))
  (disp_runitor (pr2 ff) •• pr2 ηη)
 apply (disp_vcomp_runitor (pr2 ηη)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: h ==> i
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ η] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr1 ff ◃◃ (pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
•• disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
   x'] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii)
  (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh)
   •• (pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 ηη))
 apply disp_lwhisker_lwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: h ==> i
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ η] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr2 ff ◃◃ (pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη))
•• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 ii) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · (g · h) ==> f · g · i,
            pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh) ==>[
            a0] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh) ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 ff ;; 
   pr2 gg ;; pr2 ii)
  (total2_paths2_b (lwhisker_lwhisker f g η)
     (disp_lwhisker_lwhisker (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
        (pr1 ηη)))
  (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
   •• (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 ηη))
 apply (disp_lwhisker_lwhisker (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 ηη)).

D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)

f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧

η: g ==> h

x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)

  (λ x' : f · (g · i) ==> f · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii) ==>[
   x'] pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
  (rwhisker_lwhisker f i η)
  (disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 ii)
   •• ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 ηη) ▹▹ pr1 ii))
 apply disp_rwhisker_lwhisker.

 apply (disp_rwhisker_lwhisker (pr2 ff) (pr2 ii) (pr2 ηη)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: f ==> g
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ g,, fD] pr2 x
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
disp_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)
•• ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh) ▹▹ pr1 ii) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
   pr1 ff ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii) ==>[
   x'] pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
  (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
  ((pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii))
 apply disp_rwhisker_rwhisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
i: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
η: f ==> g
w: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
x: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
y: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
z: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ f] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ f,, fD] pr2 x
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ g,, fD] pr2 x
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii)
•• ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh) ▹▹ pr2 ii) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · (h · i) ==> g · h · i,
            pr1 ff ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii) ==>[
            a0] pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii) ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg ;; 
   pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (total2_paths2_b (rwhisker_rwhisker h i η)
     (disp_rwhisker_rwhisker i η (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)
        (pr1 ηη)))
  ((pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii))
 apply (disp_rwhisker_rwhisker _ _ (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii) (pr2 ηη)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 hh) •• (pr1 gg ◃◃ pr1 φφ) =
transportb
  (λ x' : f · h ==> g · i,
   pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ x'] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii)
  (vcomp_whisker η φ)
  ((pr1 ff ◃◃ pr1 φφ) •• (pr1 ηη ▹▹ pr1 ii))
 apply disp_vcomp_whisker.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
h, i: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
η: f ==> g
φ: h ==> i
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
z: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ g] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ g,, fD] pr2 y
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ h] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ h,, fD] pr2 z
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
ηη: ∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ η] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ η,, xx] pr2 gg
φφ: ∑ xx : pr1 hh ==>[ φ] pr1 ii,
pr2 hh ==>[ φ,, xx] pr2 ii
(pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 hh) •• (pr2 gg ◃◃ pr2 φφ) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : f · h ==> g · i,
            pr1 ff ;; pr1 hh ==>[ a0] pr1 gg ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; pr2 hh ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 gg ;; 
   pr2 ii)
  (total2_paths2_b (vcomp_whisker η φ)
     (disp_vcomp_whisker η φ (pr1 x) (pr1 y) (pr1 z)
        (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg) (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii) (pr1 ηη)
        (pr1 φφ)))
  ((pr2 ff ◃◃ pr2 φφ) •• (pr2 ηη ▹▹ pr2 ii))
 apply (disp_vcomp_whisker _ _ _ _ _ (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii) (pr2 ηη) (pr2 φφ)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff) =
transportb
  (λ x' : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
   id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
   x'] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff)
  (lunitor_linvunitor f)
  (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff))
 apply disp_lunitor_linvunitor.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
y: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ f] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
disp_lunitor (pr2 ff) •• disp_linvunitor (pr2 ff) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑ a0 : id₁ a · f ==> id₁ a · f,
            id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff ==>[
            a0] id_disp (pr1 x) ;; pr1 ff,
   id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] id_disp
                                            (pr2 x) ;; 
   pr2 ff)
  (total2_paths2_b (lunitor_linvunitor f)
     (disp_lunitor_linvunitor (pr1 ff)))
  (disp_id2 (id_disp (pr2 x) ;; pr2 ff))
 apply (disp_lunitor_linvunitor (pr2 ff)).
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)

pr2 x -->[ f,, fD] pr2 y
disp_linvunitor (pr1 ff) •• disp_lunitor (pr1 ff) =
transportb (λ x' : f ==> f, pr1 ff ==>[ x'] pr1 ff)
  (linvunitor_lunitor f) (disp_id2 (pr1 ff))
 apply disp_linvunitor_lunitor.

C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b, c, d, e: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
g: C ⟦ b, c ⟧
h: C ⟦ c, d ⟧
i: C ⟦ d, e ⟧
v: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
w: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
x: ∑ d : D c, E (c,, d)
y: ∑ d0 : D d, E (d,, d0)
z: ∑ d : D e, E (e,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 v -->[ f] pr1 w,
pr2 v -->[ f,, fD] pr2 w
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 w -->[ g] pr1 x,
pr2 w -->[ g,, fD] pr2 x
hh: ∑ fD : pr1 x -->[ h] pr1 y,
pr2 x -->[ h,, fD] pr2 y
ii: ∑ fD : pr1 y -->[ i] pr1 z,
pr2 y -->[ i,, fD] pr2 z
((pr2 ff
  ◃◃ disp_lassociator (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii))
 •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh)
      (pr2 ii))
•• (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
    ▹▹ pr2 ii) =
transportb
  (λ x'xx : ∑
            a0 : f · (g · (h · i)) ==> f · g · h · i,
            pr1 ff ;; (pr1 gg ;; (pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii)) ==>[
            a0] pr1 ff ;; pr1 gg ;; pr1 hh ;; pr1 ii,
   pr2 ff ;; (pr2 gg ;; (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)) ==>[
   make_total_cell (pr1 x'xx) (pr2 x'xx)] pr2 ff ;; 
   pr2 gg ;; pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
  (total2_paths2_b (lassociator_lassociator f g h i)
     (disp_lassociator_lassociator (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
        (pr1 hh) (pr1 ii)))
  (disp_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg)
     (pr2 hh ;; pr2 ii)
   •• disp_lassociator (pr2 ff ;; pr2 gg) (pr2 hh)
        (pr2 ii))
 apply (disp_lassociator_lassociator (pr2 ff) (pr2 gg) (pr2 hh) (pr2 ii)).
  Qed.

  Definition sigma_prebicat : disp_prebicat C
    := sigma_bicat_data,, sigma_prebicat_laws.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
has_disp_cellset sigma_prebicat

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
has_disp_cellset sigma_prebicat

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
bb: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ f] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ f,, fD] pr2 bb
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ g] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ g,, fD] pr2 bb
isaset
  (∑ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[ x,, xx] pr2 gg)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
bb: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ f] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ f,, fD] pr2 bb
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ g] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ g,, fD] pr2 bb
isaset (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
bb: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ f] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ f,, fD] pr2 bb
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ g] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ g,, fD] pr2 bb
∏ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
isaset (pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
bb: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ f] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ f,, fD] pr2 bb
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ g] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ g,, fD] pr2 bb
isaset (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)
 apply disp_cellset_property.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
bb: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ f] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ f,, fD] pr2 bb
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ g] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ g,, fD] pr2 bb
∏ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
isaset (pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg)
 
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: ∑ d : D a, E (a,, d)
bb: ∑ d : D b, E (b,, d)
ff: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ f] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ f,, fD] pr2 bb
gg: ∑ fD : pr1 aa -->[ g] pr1 bb,
pr2 aa -->[ g,, fD] pr2 bb
x0: pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
isaset (pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg)
 apply disp_cellset_property.
  Qed.

  Definition sigma_bicat
    : disp_bicat C
    := sigma_prebicat,, has_disp_cellset_sigma_prebicat.

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
HE: disp_2cells_isaprop E
disp_2cells_isaprop sigma_bicat

  
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
HE: disp_2cells_isaprop E
disp_2cells_isaprop sigma_bicat

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
HE: disp_2cells_isaprop E
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat a
bb: sigma_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (ff ==>[ x] gg)

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
HE: disp_2cells_isaprop E
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat a
bb: sigma_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg)
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
HE: disp_2cells_isaprop E
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat a
bb: sigma_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ x0 y : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg
→ pr2 ff ==>[ x,, y] pr2 gg → x0 = y

    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
HE: disp_2cells_isaprop E
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat a
bb: sigma_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg)
 intro; apply HE.
    
C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
HE: disp_2cells_isaprop E
a, b: C
f, g: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat a
bb: sigma_bicat b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ x0 y : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg
→ pr2 ff ==>[ x,, y] pr2 gg → x0 = y
 intros; apply HD.
  Qed.

End Sigma.

Section SigmaTotalUnivalent.
  Context {C : bicat}
          {D₁ : disp_bicat C}
          (D₂ : disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)).

  Local Notation E₁ := (total_bicat D₂).
  Local Notation E₂ := (total_bicat (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂)).

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC_2_0: is_univalent_2_0 C
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
is_univalent_2_0 E₁

disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
 exact HD₂_2_1.
  Defined.

  Definition E₁_to_E₂ : E₁ → E₂
    := λ x, (pr11 x ,, (pr21 x ,, pr2 x)).

  Definition E₂_to_E₁ : E₂ → E₁
    := λ x, ((pr1 x ,, pr12 x) ,, pr22 x).

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
E₂ ≃ E₁

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
E₂ ≃ E₁

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
E₂ → E₁
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
isweq ?f

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
E₂ → E₁
 exact E₂_to_E₁.
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
isweq E₂_to_E₁
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
E₁ → E₂
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
∏ x : E₂, ?g (E₂_to_E₁ x) = x
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
∏ y : E₁, E₂_to_E₁ (?g y) = y

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
E₁ → E₂
 exact E₁_to_E₂.
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
∏ x : E₂, E₁_to_E₂ (E₂_to_E₁ x) = x
 apply idpath.
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
∏ y : E₁, E₂_to_E₁ (E₁_to_E₂ y) = y
 apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
x = y ≃ E₂_to_E₁ x = E₂_to_E₁ y

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
x = y ≃ E₂_to_E₁ x = E₂_to_E₁ y

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
x = y → E₂_to_E₁ x = E₂_to_E₁ y
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
isweq ?f

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
x = y → E₂_to_E₁ x = E₂_to_E₁ y
 exact (maponpaths E₂_to_E₁).
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
isweq (maponpaths E₂_to_E₁)
 exact (isweqmaponpaths E₂_to_E₁_weq x y).
  Defined.

  Definition mor_E₁_to_E₂
             {x y : E₁}
    : x --> y → E₁_to_E₂ x --> E₁_to_E₂ y
    := λ f, (pr11 f ,, (pr21 f ,, pr2 f)).

  Definition mor_E₂_to_E₁
             {x y : E₂}
    : x --> y → E₂_to_E₁ x --> E₂_to_E₁ y
    := λ f, ((pr1 f ,, pr12 f) ,, pr22 f).

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧ ≃ E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧ ≃ E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧ → E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
isweq ?f

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧ → E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧
 exact mor_E₂_to_E₁.
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
isweq mor_E₂_to_E₁
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧ → E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
∏ x0 : E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧, ?g (mor_E₂_to_E₁ x0) = x0
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
∏ y0 : E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧,
mor_E₂_to_E₁ (?g y0) = y0

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧ → E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
 exact mor_E₁_to_E₂.
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
∏ x0 : E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧,
mor_E₁_to_E₂ (mor_E₂_to_E₁ x0) = x0
 apply idpath.
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
∏ y0 : E₁ ⟦ E₂_to_E₁ x, E₂_to_E₁ y ⟧,
mor_E₂_to_E₁ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ y0) = y0
 apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g ≃ mor_E₂_to_E₁ f = mor_E₂_to_E₁ g

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g ≃ mor_E₂_to_E₁ f = mor_E₂_to_E₁ g

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g → mor_E₂_to_E₁ f = mor_E₂_to_E₁ g
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq ?f

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
f = g → mor_E₂_to_E₁ f = mor_E₂_to_E₁ g
 exact (maponpaths mor_E₂_to_E₁).
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
isweq (maponpaths mor_E₂_to_E₁)
 exact (isweqmaponpaths mor_E₂_to_E₁_weq f g).
  Defined.

  Definition cell_E₁_to_E₂
             {x y : E₁}
             {f g : x --> y}
    : f ==> g → mor_E₁_to_E₂ f ==> mor_E₁_to_E₂ g
    := λ α, (pr11 α ,, (pr21 α ,, pr2 α)).

  Definition cell_E₂_to_E₁
             {x y : E₂}
             {f g : x --> y}
    : f ==> g → mor_E₂_to_E₁ f ==> mor_E₂_to_E₁ g
    := λ α, ((pr1 α ,, pr12 α) ,, pr22 α).

  Definition cell_E₁_to_E₂_id₂
             {x y : E₁}
             (f : x --> y)
    : cell_E₁_to_E₂ (id₂ f) = id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ f)
    := idpath _.

  Definition cell_E₂_to_E₁_id₂
             {x y : E₂}
             (f : x --> y)
    : cell_E₂_to_E₁ (id₂ f) = id₂ (mor_E₂_to_E₁ f)
    := idpath _.

  Definition cell_E₁_to_E₂_vcomp
             {x y : E₁}
             {f g h : x --> y}
             (α : f ==> g) (β : g ==> h)
    : cell_E₁_to_E₂ α • cell_E₁_to_E₂ β = cell_E₁_to_E₂ (α • β)
    := idpath _.

  Definition cell_E₂_to_E₁_vcomp
             {x y : E₂}
             {f g h : x --> y}
             (α : f ==> g) (β : g ==> h)
    : cell_E₂_to_E₁ α • cell_E₂_to_E₁ β = cell_E₂_to_E₁ (α • β)
    := idpath _.

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_invertible_2cell α
→ is_invertible_2cell (cell_E₁_to_E₂ α)

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
is_invertible_2cell α
→ is_invertible_2cell (cell_E₁_to_E₂ α)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
is_invertible_2cell (cell_E₁_to_E₂ α)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
mor_E₁_to_E₂ g ==> mor_E₁_to_E₂ f
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
(λ φ : mor_E₁_to_E₂ g ==> mor_E₁_to_E₂ f,
 cell_E₁_to_E₂ α • φ = id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ f)
 × φ • cell_E₁_to_E₂ α = id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ g)) ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
mor_E₁_to_E₂ g ==> mor_E₁_to_E₂ f
 exact (cell_E₁_to_E₂ Hα^-1).
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
(λ φ : mor_E₁_to_E₂ g ==> mor_E₁_to_E₂ f,
 cell_E₁_to_E₂ α • φ = id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ f)
 × φ • cell_E₁_to_E₂ α = id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ g))
  (cell_E₁_to_E₂ Hα ^-1)
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
cell_E₁_to_E₂ α • cell_E₁_to_E₂ Hα ^-1 =
id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ f)
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
cell_E₁_to_E₂ Hα ^-1 • cell_E₁_to_E₂ α =
id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ g)

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₁
f, g: E₁ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: f ==> g
Hα: is_invertible_2cell α
cell_E₁_to_E₂ α • cell_E₁_to_E₂ Hα ^-1 =
id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ f)
 exact ((cell_E₁_to_E₂_vcomp α Hα^-1)
                  @ maponpaths cell_E₁_to_E₂ (pr12 Hα)
                  @ cell_E₁_to_E₂_id₂ _).
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C

cell_E₁_to_E₂ Hα ^-1 • cell_E₁_to_E₂ α =
id₂ (mor_E₁_to_E₂ g)
 exact ((cell_E₁_to_E₂_vcomp Hα^-1 α)
                 @ maponpaths cell_E₁_to_E₂ (pr22 Hα)
                 @ cell_E₁_to_E₂_id₂ _).
  Defined.

 exact ((cell_E₂_to_E₁_vcomp α α^-1)
                   @ maponpaths cell_E₂_to_E₁ (pr122 α)
                   @ cell_E₂_to_E₁_id₂ _).
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
cell_E₂_to_E₁ α ^-1 • cell_E₂_to_E₁ α =
id₂ (mor_E₂_to_E₁ g)
 exact ((cell_E₂_to_E₁_vcomp α^-1 α)
                   @ maponpaths cell_E₂_to_E₁ (pr222 α)
                   @ cell_E₂_to_E₁_id₂ _).
  Defined.

f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
invertible_2cell (mor_E₂_to_E₁ f) (mor_E₂_to_E₁ g)
≃ invertible_2cell f g

       (mor_E₂_to_E₁ g), ?g (iso_in_E₂ f g x0) = x0

f = g ≃ invertible_2cell f g
 exact (idtoiso_2_1_alt_E₂ f g HC_2_1 HD₁_2_1 HD₂_2_1).

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂

f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
idtoiso_2_1_alt_E₂ f g HC_2_1 HD₁_2_1 HD₂_2_1 ~

D₁: disp_bicat C

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂

f, g: E₂ ⟦ x, y ⟧
p: f = g
idtoiso_2_1_alt_E₂ f g HC_2_1 HD₁_2_1 HD₂_2_1 p =
idtoiso_2_1 f g p

x0: f ==> f

        apply (@isaprop_is_invertible_2cell (total_bicat (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂))).

      apply idpath.

l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
(λ αd : left_adjoint_data (mor_E₁_to_E₂ l),
 left_equivalence_axioms αd) ?pr1

C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
(λ g : E₂ ⟦ y, x ⟧,
 id₁ x ==> mor_E₁_to_E₂ l · g
 × g · mor_E₁_to_E₂ l ==> id₁ y) ?pr1

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
E₂ ⟦ y, x ⟧
 exact (mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)).
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
(λ g : E₂ ⟦ y, x ⟧,
 id₁ x ==> mor_E₁_to_E₂ l · g
 × g · mor_E₁_to_E₂ l ==> id₁ y)
  (mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l))
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
id₁ x ==>
mor_E₁_to_E₂ l
· mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
· mor_E₁_to_E₂ l ==> id₁ y

          
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
id₁ x ==>
mor_E₁_to_E₂ l
· mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
 exact (cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_unit l)).
          
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l)
· mor_E₁_to_E₂ l ==> id₁ y
 exact (cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_counit l)).
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
(λ αd : left_adjoint_data (mor_E₁_to_E₂ l),
 left_equivalence_axioms αd)
  (mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l),,
   cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_unit l),,
   cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_counit l))
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_unit l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_counit l)))
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_counit
     (mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_unit l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_counit l)))

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_unit l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_counit l)))
 exact (cell_E₁_to_E₂_is_invertible _ (left_equivalence_unit_iso l)).
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
x, y: E₂
l: adjoint_equivalence (E₂_to_E₁ x) (E₂_to_E₁ y)
is_invertible_2cell
  (left_adjoint_counit
     (mor_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_right_adjoint l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_unit l),,
      cell_E₁_to_E₂ (left_adjoint_counit l)))
 exact (cell_E₁_to_E₂_is_invertible _ (left_equivalence_counit_iso l)).
  Defined.

HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x, y: E₂
x = y ≃ adjoint_equivalence x y
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x, y: E₂
?w ~ idtoiso_2_0 x y

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x, y: E₂
x = y ≃ adjoint_equivalence x y
 exact (idtoiso_2_0_alt_E₂ x y HC HD₁ HD₂).
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x, y: E₂
idtoiso_2_0_alt_E₂ x y HC HD₁ HD₂ ~ idtoiso_2_0 x y
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x, y: E₂
p: x = y
idtoiso_2_0_alt_E₂ x y HC HD₁ HD₂ p =
idtoiso_2_0 x y p

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x: E₂
idtoiso_2_0_alt_E₂ x x HC HD₁ HD₂ (idpath x) =
idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x: E₂
isPredicate left_adjoint_equivalence
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_univalent_2 D₁
HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂
x: E₂
pr1 (idtoiso_2_0_alt_E₂ x x HC HD₁ HD₂ (idpath x)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x))

D₁: disp_bicat C

HC: is_univalent_2 C

isPredicate left_adjoint_equivalence

x0: E₂ ⟦ x, x ⟧
isaprop (left_adjoint_equivalence x0)

 exact (pr2 HC).
        
C: bicat

HD₂: disp_univalent_2 D₂

x: E₂
pr1 (idtoiso_2_0_alt_E₂ x x HC HD₁ HD₂ (idpath x)) =
pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x))

      reflexivity.
  Defined.
