disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
 exact (pr2 HD₂).
  Defined.
End SigmaTotalUnivalent.


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Af: left_adjoint f
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Aff: disp_left_adjoint_data Af ff
disp_left_adjoint_axioms Af Aff


C: bicat
D: disp_bicat C
HD: disp_2cells_isaprop D
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
Af: left_adjoint f
xx: D x
yy: D y
ff: xx -->[ f] yy
Aff: disp_left_adjoint_data Af ff
disp_left_adjoint_axioms Af Aff

  split ; apply HD.
Qed.


A: UU
P: A → UU
Pprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (P a)
C: (∑ y, P y) → UU
x: A
P₁, P₂: P x
y: C (x,, P₂)
transportf (λ z : ∑ y, P y, C z)
  (! subtypePath Pprop (idpath x)) y =
transportf (λ p : P x, C (x,, p))
  (! pr1 (Pprop x P₁ P₂)) y


A: UU
P: A → UU
Pprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (P a)
C: (∑ y, P y) → UU
x: A
P₁, P₂: P x
y: C (x,, P₂)
transportf (λ z : ∑ y, P y, C z)
  (! subtypePath Pprop (idpath x)) y =
transportf (λ p : P x, C (x,, p))
  (! pr1 (Pprop x P₁ P₂)) y

  
A: UU
P: A → UU
Pprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (P a)
C: (∑ y, P y) → UU
x: A
P₁, P₂: P x
y: C (x,, P₂)
transportf (λ z : ∑ y, P y, C z)
  (! paths_rect (P x) P₁
       (λ (b2 : P x) (_ : P₁ = b2), x,, P₁ = x,, b2)
       (idpath (x,, P₁)) P₂ (pr1 (Pprop x P₁ P₂))) y =
transportf (λ p : P x, C (x,, p))
  (! pr1 (Pprop x P₁ P₂)) y

  
A: UU
P: A → UU
Pprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (P a)
C: (∑ y, P y) → UU
x: A
P₁, P₂: P x
y: C (x,, P₂)
p: P₁ = P₂
q: ∏ t : P₁ = P₂, t = p
transportf (λ z : ∑ y, P y, C z)
  (! paths_rect (P x) P₁
       (λ (b2 : P x) (_ : P₁ = b2), x,, P₁ = x,, b2)
       (idpath (x,, P₁)) P₂ (pr1 (p,, q))) y =
transportf (λ p : P x, C (x,, p)) (! pr1 (p,, q)) y

  
A: UU
P: A → UU
Pprop: ∏ a : A, isaprop (P a)
C: (∑ y, P y) → UU
x: A
P₁: P x
y: C (x,, P₁)
q: ∏ t : P₁ = P₁, t = idpath P₁
transportf (λ z : ∑ y, P y, C z)
  (! paths_rect (P x) P₁
       (λ (b2 : P x) (_ : P₁ = b2), x,, P₁ = x,, b2)
       (idpath (x,, P₁)) P₁ (pr1 (idpath P₁,, q))) y =
transportf (λ p : P x, C (x,, p))
  (! pr1 (idpath P₁,, q)) y

  apply idpath.
Defined.

Section SigmaDisplayedUnivalent.
  Context {C : bicat}
          {D₁ : disp_bicat C}
          (D₂ : disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)).

  Variable (HC : is_univalent_2 C)
           (HD₁ : disp_2cells_isaprop D₁)
           (HD₂ : disp_2cells_isaprop D₂)
           (HD₁_2_1 : disp_univalent_2_1 D₁)
           (HD₂_2_1 : disp_univalent_2_1 D₂).

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
(∑
 p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
       ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
   ff2 gg2)
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
    (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
(∑
 p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
       ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
   ff2 gg2)
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
    (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(ff1,, ff2) ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] (gg1,, gg2)
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(λ x0 : (ff1,, ff2) ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell f] 
        (gg1,, gg2),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) x0)
  ?pr1

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(ff1,, ff2) ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] (gg1,, gg2)
 exact (pr11 p ,, pr12 p).
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(λ x0 : (ff1,, ff2) ==>[
        id2_invertible_2cell f] (gg1,, gg2),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) x0)
  (pr11 p,, pr12 p)
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f)
  (pr11 p,, pr12 p)

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(gg1,, gg2) ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f) ^-1] (ff1,, ff2)
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(pr11 p,, pr12 p) •• ?pr1 =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> f, (ff1,, ff2) ==>[ α] (ff1,, ff2))
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f))
  (disp_id2 (ff1,, ff2))
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(λ _ : (pr11 p,, pr12 p) •• ?pr1 =
       transportb
         (λ α : f ==> f,
          (ff1,, ff2) ==>[ α] (ff1,, ff2))
         (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f))
         (disp_id2 (ff1,, ff2)),
 ?pr1 •• (pr11 p,, pr12 p) =
 transportb
   (λ α : f ==> f, (gg1,, gg2) ==>[ α] (gg1,, gg2))
   (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f))
   (disp_id2 (gg1,, gg2))) 
  ?pr10

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(gg1,, gg2) ==>[
(is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f) ^-1] (ff1,, ff2)
 exact (disp_inv_cell (pr1 p) ,, disp_inv_cell (pr2 p)).

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(pr11 p,, pr12 p)
•• (disp_inv_cell (pr1 p),, disp_inv_cell (pr2 p)) =
transportb
  (λ α : f ==> f, (ff1,, ff2) ==>[ α] (ff1,, ff2))
  (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f))
  (disp_id2 (ff1,, ff2))
 apply disp_2cells_isaprop_sigma ; assumption.
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
(λ _ : (pr11 p,, pr12 p)
       •• (disp_inv_cell (pr1 p),,
           disp_inv_cell (pr2 p)) =
       transportb
         (λ α : f ==> f,
          (ff1,, ff2) ==>[ α] (ff1,, ff2))
         (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f))
         (disp_id2 (ff1,, ff2)),
 (disp_inv_cell (pr1 p),, disp_inv_cell (pr2 p))
 •• (pr11 p,, pr12 p) =
 transportb
   (λ α : f ==> f, (gg1,, gg2) ==>[ α] (gg1,, gg2))
   (vcomp_linv (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f))
   (disp_id2 (gg1,, gg2)))
  (let X :=
     λ (C : bicat) (D : disp_bicat C)
     (E : disp_bicat (total_bicat D))
     (HD : disp_2cells_isaprop D)
     (HE : disp_2cells_isaprop E) (a b : C)
     (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
     (aa : sigma_bicat C D E a)
     (bb : sigma_bicat C D E b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
     (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
     pr1
       (disp_2cells_isaprop_sigma C D E HD HE a b f g
          x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
   X C D₁ D₂ HD₁ HD₂ x y f f
     (id₂ f • (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f) ^-1) xx yy
     (ff1,, ff2) (ff1,, ff2)
     ((pr11 p,, pr12 p)
      •• (disp_inv_cell (pr1 p),,
          disp_inv_cell (pr2 p)))
     (transportb
        (λ α : f ==> f,
         (ff1,, ff2) ==>[ α] (ff1,, ff2))
        (vcomp_rinv (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f))
        (disp_id2 (ff1,, ff2))))
 apply disp_2cells_isaprop_sigma ; assumption.
  Defined.

bb: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ b

bb: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ b

xx: ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg
p₁:= pr1 xx,,
LG₁ a b f f (id2_invertible_2cell f) 
  (pr1 aa) (pr1 bb) (pr1 ff) 
  (pr1 gg) (pr1 xx)
:
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg): disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)

a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ a
bb: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ b
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] bb
xx: ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg
p₁:= pr1 xx,,
LG₁ a b f f (id2_invertible_2cell f) 
  (pr1 aa) (pr1 bb) (pr1 ff) 
  (pr1 gg) (pr1 xx)
:
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg): disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
m:= pr2 xx: (λ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] pr1 gg,
 let PPP := (f,, pr1 ff) ==> (f,, pr1 gg) in
 pr2 ff ==>[
 id2_invertible_2cell f,, xx : PPP] 
 pr2 gg) (pr1 xx)
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f)
  xx

  (pr1 aa) (pr1 bb) (pr1 ff) 
  (pr1 gg) (pr1 xx)
:

LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
a, b: C
f: C ⟦ a, b ⟧
aa: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ a
bb: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ b
ff, gg: aa -->[ f] bb
xx: ff ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg
p₁:= pr1 xx,,
LG₁ a b f f (id2_invertible_2cell f) 
  (pr1 aa) (pr1 bb) (pr1 ff) 
  (pr1 gg) (pr1 xx)
:
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg): disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg)
m:= pr2 xx: pr2 ff ==>[ id₂ f,, pr1 xx] pr2 gg
p₂:= pr2 xx,,
LG₂ (a,, pr1 aa) (b,, pr1 bb) 
  (f,, pr1 ff) (f,, pr1 gg)
  (iso_in_E_weq (pr1 ff) 
     (pr1 gg) (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p₁))
  (pr2 aa) (pr2 bb) (pr2 ff) 
  (pr2 gg) m: ∑ y,
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq (pr1 ff) 
     (pr1 gg) (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p₁)) y
is_disp_invertible_2cell (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ f)
  xx

      exact (pr2 (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible _ _ (p₁ ,, p₂))).

 exact (pr2 HC).

yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y

ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy

  disp_invertible_2cell
    (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
    ff2 gg2

p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ p : disp_invertible_2cell 
         (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
   ff2 gg2) ?pr1

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C

HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
ff1 ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg1

C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
pr11 p •• ?pr1 =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
  (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f)) 
  (disp_id2 ff1)
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ _ : pr11 p •• ?pr1 =
       transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
         (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 ff1),
 ?pr1 •• pr11 p =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
   (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
   (disp_id2 gg1)) ?pr10

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y

ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
gg1 ==>[ (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1] ff1
 exact (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p)).
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
  (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f)) (disp_id2 ff1)
 apply HD₁.
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ _ : pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) =
       transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
         (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 ff1),
 pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
   (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
   (disp_id2 gg1))
  (let X :=
     λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
     (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
     (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
     pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
   X x y f f
     (id2_invertible_2cell f
      • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
     (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
     (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
     (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
        (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
        (disp_id2 ff1)))
 apply HD₁.
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
         ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
   ff2 gg2)
  (pr11 p,,
   pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
   (let X :=
      λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
      (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
      (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
      pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
    X x y f f
      (id2_invertible_2cell f
       • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
      (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
      (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
      (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
         (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 ff1))),,
   (let X :=
      λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
      (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
      (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
      pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
    X x y f f
      ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
       • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) gg1
      gg1 (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
      (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
         (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 gg1))))
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
ff2 ==>[
iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
  (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
   pr11 p,,
   pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
   (let X :=
      λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
      (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
      (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
      pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
    X x y f f
      (id2_invertible_2cell f
       • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
      (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
      (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
      (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
         (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 ff1))),,
   (let X :=
      λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
      (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
      (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
      pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
    X x y f f
      ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
       • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) gg1
      gg1 (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
      (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
         (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 gg1))))] gg2
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ x0 : ff2 ==>[
        iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
          (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
           pr11 p,,
           pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
           (let X :=
              λ (a b : C) 
              (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
              (x : f ==> g) 
              (aa : D₁ a) 
              (bb : D₁ b) 
              (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
              (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
              (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
              pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
            X x y f f
              (id2_invertible_2cell f
               • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1)
              (pr1 xx) 
              (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
              (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
              (transportb
                 (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                 (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                 (disp_id2 ff1))),,
           (let X :=
              λ (a b : C) 
              (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
              (x : f ==> g) 
              (aa : D₁ a) 
              (bb : D₁ b) 
              (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
              (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
              (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
              pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
            X x y f f
              ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
               • id2_invertible_2cell f) 
              (pr1 xx) 
              (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
              (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
              (transportb
                 (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                 (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                 (disp_id2 gg1))))] gg2,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
      (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
       pr11 p,,
       pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
       (let X :=
          λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
          (x : f ==> g) 
          (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) 
          (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) 
          (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
          (x1 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
          pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x1 x') in
        X x y f f
          (id2_invertible_2cell f
           • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) 
          (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
          (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
          (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
             (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
             (disp_id2 ff1))),,
       (let X :=
          λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
          (x : f ==> g) 
          (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) 
          (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) 
          (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
          (x1 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
          pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x1 x') in
        X x y f f
          ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
           • id2_invertible_2cell f) 
          (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
          (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
          (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
             (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
             (disp_id2 gg1))))) x0) 
  ?pr1

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
ff2 ==>[
iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
  (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
   pr11 p,,
   pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
   (let X :=
      λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
      (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
      (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
      pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
    X x y f f
      (id2_invertible_2cell f
       • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
      (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
      (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
      (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
         (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 ff1))),,
   (let X :=
      λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
      (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
      (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
      pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
    X x y f f
      ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
       • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) gg1
      gg1 (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
      (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
         (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
         (disp_id2 gg1))))] gg2
 exact (pr21 p).
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ x0 : ff2 ==>[
        iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
          (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
           pr11 p,,
           pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
           (let X :=
              λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
              (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
              (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
              (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
              (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
              pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
            X x y f f
              (id2_invertible_2cell f
               • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1)
              (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
              (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
              (transportb
                 (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                 (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                 (disp_id2 ff1))),,
           (let X :=
              λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
              (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
              (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
              (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
              (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
              pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
            X x y f f
              ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
               • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx)
              (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
              (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
              (transportb
                 (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                 (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                 (disp_id2 gg1))))] gg2,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
      (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
       pr11 p,,
       pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
       (let X :=
          λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
          (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
          (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
          (x1 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
          pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x1 x') in
        X x y f f
          (id2_invertible_2cell f
           • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
          (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
          (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
          (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
             (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
             (disp_id2 ff1))),,
       (let X :=
          λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
          (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
          (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
          (x1 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
          pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x1 x') in
        X x y f f
          ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
           • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy)
          gg1 gg1 (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
          (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
             (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
             (disp_id2 gg1))))) x0) (pr21 p)
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
gg2 ==>[
(iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
   (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
    pr11 p,,
    pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
    (let X :=
       λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
       (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
       (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
       pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
     X x y f f
       (id2_invertible_2cell f
        • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
       (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
       (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
       (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
          (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
          (disp_id2 ff1))),,
    (let X :=
       λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
       (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
       (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
       pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
     X x y f f
       ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
        • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy)
       gg1 gg1 (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
       (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
          (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
          (disp_id2 gg1))))) ^-1] ff2
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
pr21 p •• ?pr1 =
transportb
  (λ α : (f,, ff1) ==> (f,, ff1), ff2 ==>[ α] ff2)
  (vcomp_rinv
     (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
        (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
         pr11 p,,
         pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
         (let X :=
            λ (a b : C) 
            (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
            (x : f ==> g) 
            (aa : D₁ a) 
            (bb : D₁ b) 
            (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) 
            (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
            (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
            pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
          X x y f f
            (id2_invertible_2cell f
             • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) 
            (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
            (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
            (transportb
               (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
               (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
               (disp_id2 ff1))),,
         (let X :=
            λ (a b : C) 
            (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
            (x : f ==> g) 
            (aa : D₁ a) 
            (bb : D₁ b) 
            (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) 
            (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
            (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
            pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
          X x y f f
            ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
             • id2_invertible_2cell f) 
            (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
            (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
            (transportb
               (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
               (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
               (disp_id2 gg1)))))) 
  (disp_id2 ff2)
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ _ : pr21 p •• ?pr1 =
       transportb
         (λ α : (f,, ff1) ==> (f,, ff1),
          ff2 ==>[ α] ff2)
         (vcomp_rinv
            (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
               (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
                pr11 p,,
                pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
                (let X :=
                   λ (a b : C) 
                   (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
                   (x : f ==> g) 
                   (aa : D₁ a) 
                   (bb : D₁ b) 
                   (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
                   (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
                   (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
                   pr1
                     (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
                   in
                 X x y f f
                   (id2_invertible_2cell f
                    • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1)
                   (pr1 xx) 
                   (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
                   (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
                   (transportb
                      (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                      (vcomp_rinv
                      (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                      (disp_id2 ff1))),,
                (let X :=
                   λ (a b : C) 
                   (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
                   (x : f ==> g) 
                   (aa : D₁ a) 
                   (bb : D₁ b) 
                   (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
                   (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
                   (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
                   pr1
                     (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
                   in
                 X x y f f
                   ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
                    • id2_invertible_2cell f) 
                   (pr1 xx) 
                   (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
                   (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
                   (transportb
                      (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                      (vcomp_linv
                      (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                      (disp_id2 gg1))))))
         (disp_id2 ff2),
 ?pr1 •• pr21 p =
 transportb
   (λ α : (f,, gg1) ==> (f,, gg1), gg2 ==>[ α] gg2)
   (vcomp_linv
      (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
         (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
          pr11 p,,
          pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
          (let X :=
             λ (a b : C) 
             (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
             (x : f ==> g) 
             (aa : D₁ a) 
             (bb : D₁ b) 
             (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) 
             (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
             (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
             pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
           X x y f f
             (id2_invertible_2cell f
              • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) 
             (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
             (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
             (transportb
                (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                (disp_id2 ff1))),,
          (let X :=
             λ (a b : C) 
             (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
             (x : f ==> g) 
             (aa : D₁ a) 
             (bb : D₁ b) 
             (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) 
             (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
             (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
             pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
           X x y f f
             ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
              • id2_invertible_2cell f) 
             (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
             (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
             (transportb
                (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                (disp_id2 gg1)))))) 
   (disp_id2 gg2)) ?pr10

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
gg2 ==>[
(iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
   (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
    pr11 p,,
    pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
    (let X :=
       λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
       (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
       (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
       pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
     X x y f f
       (id2_invertible_2cell f
        • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
       (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
       (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
       (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
          (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
          (disp_id2 ff1))),,
    (let X :=
       λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
       (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
       (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
       pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
     X x y f f
       ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
        • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy)
       gg1 gg1 (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
       (transportb (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
          (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
          (disp_id2 gg1))))) ^-1] ff2
 exact (pr2 (disp_inv_cell p)).
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
pr21 p •• pr2 (disp_inv_cell p) =
transportb
  (λ α : (f,, ff1) ==> (f,, ff1), ff2 ==>[ α] ff2)
  (vcomp_rinv
     (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
        (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
         pr11 p,,
         pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
         (let X :=
            λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
            (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
            (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
            (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
            pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
          X x y f f
            (id2_invertible_2cell f
             • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
            (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
            (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
            (transportb
               (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
               (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
               (disp_id2 ff1))),,
         (let X :=
            λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
            (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
            (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
            (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
            pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
          X x y f f
            ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
             • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx)
            (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
            (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
            (transportb
               (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
               (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
               (disp_id2 gg1)))))) (disp_id2 ff2)
 apply HD₂.
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
(λ _ : pr21 p •• pr2 (disp_inv_cell p) =
       transportb
         (λ α : (f,, ff1) ==> (f,, ff1),
          ff2 ==>[ α] ff2)
         (vcomp_rinv
            (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
               (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
                pr11 p,,
                pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
                (let X :=
                   λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a)
                   (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
                   (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
                   (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
                   pr1
                     (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
                   in
                 X x y f f
                   (id2_invertible_2cell f
                    • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1)
                   (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
                   (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
                   (transportb
                      (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                      (vcomp_rinv
                         (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                      (disp_id2 ff1))),,
                (let X :=
                   λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                   (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a)
                   (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
                   (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
                   (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
                   pr1
                     (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
                   in
                 X x y f f
                   ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
                    • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx)
                   (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
                   (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
                   (transportb
                      (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                      (vcomp_linv
                         (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                      (disp_id2 gg1))))))
         (disp_id2 ff2),
 pr2 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr21 p =
 transportb
   (λ α : (f,, gg1) ==> (f,, gg1), gg2 ==>[ α] gg2)
   (vcomp_linv
      (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
         (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
          pr11 p,,
          pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
          (let X :=
             λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
             (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
             (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
             pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
           X x y f f
             (id2_invertible_2cell f
              • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
             (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
             (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
             (transportb
                (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                (disp_id2 ff1))),,
          (let X :=
             λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
             (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
             (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
             (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
             pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
           X x y f f
             ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
              • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx)
             (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
             (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
             (transportb
                (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                (disp_id2 gg1)))))) (disp_id2 gg2))
  (let X :=
     λ (a b : total_bicat D₁)
     (f g : total_bicat D₁ ⟦ a, b ⟧) (x : f ==> g)
     (aa : D₂ a) (bb : D₂ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
     (gg : aa -->[ g] bb) (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
     pr1 (HD₂ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
   X (x,, pr1 xx) (y,, pr1 yy) (f,, ff1) (f,, ff1)
     (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
        (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
         pr11 p,,
         pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
         (let X0 :=
            λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
            (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
            (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
            (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
            pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
          X0 x y f f
            (id2_invertible_2cell f
             • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1) (pr1 xx)
            (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
            (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
            (transportb
               (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
               (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
               (disp_id2 ff1))),,
         (let X0 :=
            λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
            (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
            (ff : aa -->[ f] bb) (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
            (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
            pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x') in
          X0 x y f f
            ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
             • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx)
            (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
            (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
            (transportb
               (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
               (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
               (disp_id2 gg1))))
      • (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
           (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
            pr11 p,,
            pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
            (let X0 :=
               λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
               (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
               (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
               (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
               pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
               in
             X0 x y f f
               (id2_invertible_2cell f
                • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1)
               (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
               (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
               (transportb
                  (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                  (vcomp_rinv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                  (disp_id2 ff1))),,
            (let X0 :=
               λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
               (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a) (bb : D₁ b)
               (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
               (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
               (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
               pr1 (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
               in
             X0 x y f f
               ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
                • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx)
               (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
               (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
               (transportb
                  (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                  (vcomp_linv (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                  (disp_id2 gg1))))) ^-1) (pr2 xx)
     (pr2 yy) ff2 ff2
     (pr21 p •• pr2 (disp_inv_cell p))
     (transportb
        (λ α : (f,, ff1) ==> (f,, ff1),
         ff2 ==>[ α] ff2)
        (vcomp_rinv
           (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
              (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
               pr11 p,,
               pr1 (disp_inv_cell p),,
               (let X0 :=
                  λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                  (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a)
                  (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
                  (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
                  (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
                  pr1
                    (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
                  in
                X0 x y f f
                  (id2_invertible_2cell f
                   • (id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1)
                  (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy) ff1 ff1
                  (pr11 p •• pr1 (disp_inv_cell p))
                  (transportb
                     (λ α : f ==> f, ff1 ==>[ α] ff1)
                     (vcomp_rinv
                        (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                     (disp_id2 ff1))),,
               (let X0 :=
                  λ (a b : C) (f g : C ⟦ a, b ⟧)
                  (x : f ==> g) (aa : D₁ a)
                  (bb : D₁ b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
                  (gg : aa -->[ g] bb)
                  (x0 x' : ff ==>[ x] gg),
                  pr1
                    (HD₁ a b f g x aa bb ff gg x0 x')
                  in
                X0 x y f f
                  ((id2_invertible_2cell f) ^-1
                   • id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 xx)
                  (pr1 yy) gg1 gg1
                  (pr1 (disp_inv_cell p) •• pr11 p)
                  (transportb
                     (λ α : f ==> f, gg1 ==>[ α] gg1)
                     (vcomp_linv
                        (id2_invertible_2cell f))
                     (disp_id2 gg1))))))
        (disp_id2 ff2)))
 apply HD₂.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
(∑
 p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
       ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
   ff2 gg2)
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
    (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)

HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂

ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
(∑
 p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
       ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
   ff2 gg2)
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
    (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
(∑
 p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
       ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))

D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C

HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
isweq ?f

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C

HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
(∑
 p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
       ff1 gg1,
 disp_invertible_2cell
   (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
   ff2 gg2)
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
    (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
 apply pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible.
    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
isweq
  (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2)
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
→ ∑
  p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
        ff1 gg1,
  disp_invertible_2cell
    (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
    ff2 gg2
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
∏
x0 : ∑
     p : disp_invertible_2cell
           (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
     disp_invertible_2cell
       (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
          (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2,
?g
  (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2 x0) = x0
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
∏
y0 : disp_invertible_2cell 
       (id2_invertible_2cell f) 
       (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2),
pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2 gg2
  (?g y0) = y0

      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
→ ∑
  p : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
        ff1 gg1,
  disp_invertible_2cell
    (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1 (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p))
    ff2 gg2
 apply sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible.
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
∏
x0 : ∑
     p : disp_invertible_2cell
           (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
     disp_invertible_2cell
       (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
          (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2,
sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2 gg2
  (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2 x0) = x0
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: ∑
p : disp_invertible_2cell 
      (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p)) ff2 gg2
sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2 gg2
  (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2 p) = p

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2 gg2
  (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2 (p1,, p2)) = p1,, p2

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr1
  (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2
     (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) = pr1 (p1,, p2)
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr2
  (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2
     (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) =
transportb
  (λ x0 : disp_invertible_2cell
            (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
   disp_invertible_2cell
     (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
        (id2_invertible_2cell f,, x0)) ff2 gg2) 
  ?p (pr2 (p1,, p2))

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr1
  (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2
     (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) = pr1 (p1,, p2)
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f))

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂

ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr11 (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2
        (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
           ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) = pr11 
(p1,, p2)

  ff1 gg1

 intro ; apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell. 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr11 (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2
        (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
           ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) = pr11 (p1,, p2)

          apply idpath.
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr2
  (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2
     (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) =
transportb
  (λ x0 : disp_invertible_2cell
            (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
   disp_invertible_2cell
     (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
        (id2_invertible_2cell f,, x0)) ff2 gg2)
  (subtypePath
     ((λ x0 : ff1 ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg1,
       isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell x0)
      :
      isPredicate
        (is_disp_invertible_2cell
           (id2_invertible_2cell f)))
     (idpath (pr11 (p1,, p2)))) (pr2 (p1,, p2))
 
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
        (id2_invertible_2cell f,,
         pr1
           (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible
              ff2 gg2
              (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
                 ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))))))
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr12 (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2
        (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
           ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ x0 : disp_invertible_2cell
               (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
      disp_invertible_2cell
        (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
           (id2_invertible_2cell f,, x0)) ff2 gg2)
     (subtypePath
        ((λ x0 : ff1 ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg1,
          isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell x0)
         :
         isPredicate
           (is_disp_invertible_2cell
              (id2_invertible_2cell f)))
        (idpath (pr11 (p1,, p2)))) 
     (pr2 (p1,, p2)))

HC: is_univalent_2 C

HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy

  ff1 gg1

  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
isPredicate

                 ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))))))

D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p1: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  ff1 gg1
p2: disp_invertible_2cell
  (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
     (id2_invertible_2cell f,, p1)) ff2 gg2
pr12 (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2
        (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible
           ff2 gg2 (p1,, p2))) =
pr1
  (transportb
     (λ x0 : disp_invertible_2cell
               (id2_invertible_2cell f) ff1 gg1,
      disp_invertible_2cell
        (iso_in_E_weq ff1 gg1
           (id2_invertible_2cell f,, x0)) ff2 gg2)
     (subtypePath
        ((λ x0 : ff1 ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] gg1,
          isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell x0)
         :
         isPredicate
           (is_disp_invertible_2cell
              (id2_invertible_2cell f)))
        (idpath (pr11 (p1,, p2)))) (pr2 (p1,, p2)))

          apply HD₂.
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
∏
y0 : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
       (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2),
pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2 gg2
  (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2 y0) = y0

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧

yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y

ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2 gg2
  (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2 p) = p

ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy

          ; apply (@isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell C (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂)).

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂

f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
ff2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, ff1] pr2 yy
gg1: pr1 xx -->[ f] pr1 yy
gg2: pr2 xx -->[ f,, gg1] pr2 yy
p: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f)
  (ff1,, ff2) (gg1,, gg2)
pr1
  (pair_disp_invertible_to_sigma_disp_invertible ff2
     gg2
     (sigma_disp_invertible_to_pair_disp_invertible
        ff2 gg2 p)) = pr1 p

        apply idpath.
  Defined.

C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff, gg: xx -->[ f] yy
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂) (idpath f)
     ff gg)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
x, y: C
f: C ⟦ x, y ⟧
xx: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff, gg: xx -->[ f] yy
transportf (λ z : C ⟦ x, y ⟧, xx -->[ z] yy)
  (idpath f) ff = gg
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
    ff gg

yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ y
ff, gg: xx -->[ f] yy
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂) 
  (idpath f) ff gg

D₁: disp_bicat C
