HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) xx yy
→ ∑
  p : disp_adjoint_equivalence
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
        (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy),
  disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq (pr1 xx)
          (pr1 yy))
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,, p))
    (pr2 xx) (pr2 yy)
 exact (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv_inv xx yy).
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
∏
x0 : ∑
     p : disp_adjoint_equivalence
           (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
           (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy),
     disp_adjoint_equivalence
       (invmap
          (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq (pr1 xx)
             (pr1 yy))
          (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,, p))
       (pr2 xx) (pr2 yy),
pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv_inv xx yy
  (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv xx yy x0) =
x0
 exact (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv_weq_help xx yy).
      
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
∏
y : disp_adjoint_equivalence
      (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) xx yy,
pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv xx yy
  (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv_inv xx yy
     y) = y

D₁: disp_bicat C

HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂

LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) xx yy
pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv xx yy
  (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv_inv xx yy
     p) = p

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) xx yy
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) xx yy
pr1
  (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv xx yy
     (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv_inv xx
        yy p)) = pr1 p

        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) xx yy
isPredicate
  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x))
 intro ; apply isaprop_disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
          ; [ exact (pr2 HC) | exact sigma_disp_univalent_2_1_with_props ].
        
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂

LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x) xx yy
pr1
  (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv xx yy
     (pair_disp_adjequiv_to_sigma_disp_adjequiv_inv xx
        yy p)) = pr1 p

        apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (x,, xx1))
  xx2 yy2
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)) xx2
    yy2

p: disp_adjoint_equivalence

C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (x,, xx1))
  xx2 yy2
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (invmap
        (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
         disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit
     (invmap
        (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
         disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1))
     (pr112 p,, pr121 (pr2 p),, pr221 (pr2 p)))
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (x,, xx1))
  xx2 yy2
(λ _ : is_disp_invertible_2cell
         (left_equivalence_unit_iso
            (invmap
               (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1
                  xx1)
               (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                  x,,
                disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)))
         (disp_left_adjoint_unit
            (invmap
               (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1
                  xx1)
               (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity
                  x,,
                disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1))
            (pr112 p,, pr121 (pr2 p),, pr221 (pr2 p))),
 is_disp_invertible_2cell
   (left_equivalence_counit_iso
      (invmap
         (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
          disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)))
   (disp_left_adjoint_counit
      (invmap
         (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
          disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1))
      (pr112 p,, pr121 (pr2 p),, pr221 (pr2 p))))
  ?pr10

HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂

LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity (x,, xx1))
  xx2 yy2
→ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)) xx2
    yy2

HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (invmap
     (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
      disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)) xx2
  yy2
x0: xx2 -->[
invmap
  (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
   disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)] yy2
is_univalent_2_1 DispAdjunctions.E

C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
p: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (invmap
     (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
      disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)) xx2
  yy2
pr1
  (disp_adjequiv_sigma_help x xx1 xx2 yy2
     (disp_adjequiv_sigma_help_inv x xx1 xx2 yy2 p)) =
pr1 p

        apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
xx = yy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) xx yy

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
xx = yy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) xx yy

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
xx ╝ yy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) xx yy

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
xx ╝ yy
≃ (∑
   p : disp_adjoint_equivalence
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x)
         (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy),
   disp_adjoint_equivalence
     (invmap
        (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq (pr1 xx)
           (pr1 yy))
        (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,, p))
     (pr2 xx) (pr2 yy))

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
∏
x0 : transportf (λ z : C, D₁ z) (idpath x) (pr1 xx) =
     pr1 yy,
transportf (λ x1 : D₁ x, D₂ (x,, x1)) x0 (pr2 xx) =
pr2 yy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq (pr1 xx)
          (pr1 yy))
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        make_weq
          (disp_idtoiso_2_0 D₁ (idpath x) (pr1 xx)
             (pr1 yy))
          (HD₁_2_0 x x (idpath x) (pr1 xx) (pr1 yy))
          x0)) (pr2 xx) (pr2 yy)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
∏
x0 : transportf (λ z : C, D₁ z) (idpath x)
       (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) = pr1 yy,
transportf (λ x1 : D₁ x, D₂ (x,, x1)) x0
  (pr2 (xx1,, xx2)) = pr2 yy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq
          (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 yy))
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        make_weq
          (disp_idtoiso_2_0 D₁ (idpath x)
             (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 yy))
          (HD₁_2_0 x x (idpath x) (pr1 (xx1,, xx2))
             (pr1 yy)) x0)) (pr2 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr2 yy)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
yy1: D₁ x
yy2: D₂ (x,, yy1)
∏
x0 : transportf (λ z : C, D₁ z) (idpath x)
       (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) = pr1 (yy1,, yy2),
transportf (λ x1 : D₁ x, D₂ (x,, x1)) x0
  (pr2 (xx1,, xx2)) = pr2 (yy1,, yy2)
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq
          (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 (yy1,, yy2)))
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        make_weq
          (disp_idtoiso_2_0 D₁ (idpath x)
             (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 (yy1,, yy2)))
          (HD₁_2_0 x x (idpath x) (pr1 (xx1,, xx2))
             (pr1 (yy1,, yy2))) x0)) (pr2 (xx1,, xx2))
    (pr2 (yy1,, yy2))

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
yy1: D₁ x
yy2: D₂ (x,, yy1)
p: xx1 = yy1
transportf (λ x0 : D₁ x, D₂ (x,, x0)) p
  (pr2 (xx1,, xx2)) = pr2 (yy1,, yy2)
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq
          (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 (yy1,, yy2)))
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        make_weq
          (disp_idtoiso_2_0 D₁ (idpath x)
             (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 (yy1,, yy2)))
          (HD₁_2_0 x x (idpath x) (pr1 (xx1,, xx2))
             (pr1 (yy1,, yy2))) p)) (pr2 (xx1,, xx2))
    (pr2 (yy1,, yy2))

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
transportf (λ x0 : D₁ x, D₂ (x,, x0)) (idpath xx1)
  (pr2 (xx1,, xx2)) = pr2 (xx1,, yy2)
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq
          (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 (xx1,, yy2)))
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        make_weq
          (disp_idtoiso_2_0 D₁ (idpath x)
             (pr1 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr1 (xx1,, yy2)))
          (HD₁_2_0 x x (idpath x) (pr1 (xx1,, xx2))
             (pr1 (xx1,, yy2))) (idpath xx1)))
    (pr2 (xx1,, xx2)) (pr2 (xx1,, yy2))

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
xx2 = yy2
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)) xx2
    yy2

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx1: D₁ x
xx2, yy2: D₂ (x,, xx1)
disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (idtoiso_2_0 (x,, xx1) (x,, xx1) (idpath (x,, xx1)))
  xx2 yy2
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (invmap
       (adjoint_equivalence_total_disp_weq xx1 xx1)
       (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity x,,
        disp_identity_adjoint_equivalence xx1)) xx2
    yy2

    exact (disp_adjequiv_sigma_help_weq x xx1 xx2 yy2).
  Defined.

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
disp_univalent_2_0 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂)

  
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
disp_univalent_2_0 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
fiberwise_univalent_2_0 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂) (idpath x)
     xx yy)

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
transportf (λ z : C, sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ z) (idpath x)
  xx = yy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) xx yy
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂) 
  (idpath x) xx yy

    
C: bicat
D₁: disp_bicat C
D₂: disp_bicat (total_bicat D₁)
HC: is_univalent_2 C
HD₁: disp_2cells_isaprop D₁
HD₂: disp_2cells_isaprop D₂
HD₁_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₁
HD₂_2_1: disp_univalent_2_1 D₂
LG₁: disp_locally_groupoid D₁
LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
transportf (λ z : C, sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ z) (idpath x)
  xx = yy
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 x x (idpath x)) xx yy
 exact (sigma_idtoiso_2_0_alt HD₁_2_0 HD₂_2_0 xx yy).

LG₂: disp_locally_groupoid D₂
HD₁_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₁
HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
sigma_idtoiso_2_0_alt HD₁_2_0 HD₂_2_0 xx yy ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂) (idpath x) xx
  yy

HD₂_2_0: disp_univalent_2_0 D₂
x: C
xx, yy: sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ x
p: transportf (λ z : C, sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂ z)
  (idpath x) xx = yy
sigma_idtoiso_2_0_alt HD₁_2_0 HD₂_2_0 xx yy p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 (sigma_bicat C D₁ D₂) (idpath x) xx
  yy p

p: xx = yy

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
disp_2cells_iscontr (sigma_bicat B D E)


B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
disp_2cells_iscontr (sigma_bicat B D E)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
iscontr (ff ==>[ x] gg)

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E

x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isaprop (ff ==>[ x] gg)

D: disp_bicat B

E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E

x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
ff ==>[ x] gg

  
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g

B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg)
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ x0 y : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg
→ pr2 ff ==>[ x,, y] pr2 gg → x0 = y

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
isPredicate
  (λ x0 : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
   pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg)
 intro ; apply isapropifcontr, E_contr. 
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
∏ x0 y : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg
→ pr2 ff ==>[ x,, y] pr2 gg → x0 = y

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
x0, y: pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
X: pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg
X0: pr2 ff ==>[ x,, y] pr2 gg
x0 = y

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
x0, y: pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
X: pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg
X0: pr2 ff ==>[ x,, y] pr2 gg
isaprop (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
x0, y: pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
X: pr2 ff ==>[ x,, x0] pr2 gg
X0: pr2 ff ==>[ x,, y] pr2 gg
iscontr (pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg)

    apply D_contr.

a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
(λ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
 let PPP := (f,, pr1 ff) ==> (g,, pr1 gg) in
 pr2 ff ==>[ x,, xx : PPP] pr2 gg) 
  ?pr1

    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg
 apply D_contr.
    
B: bicat
D: disp_bicat B
E: disp_bicat (total_bicat D)
D_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr D
E_contr: disp_2cells_iscontr E
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: f ==> g
aa: sigma_bicat B D E a
bb: sigma_bicat B D E b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
(λ xx : pr1 ff ==>[ x] pr1 gg,
 let PPP := (f,, pr1 ff) ==> (g,, pr1 gg) in
 pr2 ff ==>[ x,, xx : PPP] pr2 gg)
  (let X :=
     λ (a b : B) (f g : B ⟦ a, b ⟧) 
     (x : f ==> g) (aa : D a) 
     (bb : D b) (ff : aa -->[ f] bb)
     (gg : aa -->[ g] bb),
     pr1 (D_contr a b f g x aa bb ff gg) in
   X a b f g x (pr1 aa) (pr1 bb) (pr1 ff) (pr1 gg))
 apply E_contr.
Qed.
